name: Peanut-Butter Marble Square Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Mix flour, salt and baking soda in a bowl.
Mix margarine and peanut butter in another bowl. Add granulated and brown sugars; mix well. Add eggs and water; beat until smooth.
Stir the flour mixture into the peanut-butter mixture.
Spread dough evenly in an ungreased 15-by-10-by-1-inch jelly-roll pan. Sprinkle with chocolate chips.
Place the pan in the oven for 2 to 3 minutes, or until chips are soft and spreadable. Remove from the oven and run a knife back and forth through the dough to marbleize the chocolate. Return to the oven; bake an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
Yield: 24 servings.
